general.title: General Settings
general.description: General application and user interface settings.

indexing.title: Indexing your images
indexing.keepOpen: Keep this page open while indexing completes. Indexing runs locally in your browser and may take up to a minute per image.

indexOutdated.title: Your index is out of date
indexOutdated.description: Your image collection has changed since the last indexing run. Update the index to include new or modified images in Visual Search.
indexOutdated.footnote: Visual search only includes indexed images until you update. Processing time depends on your collection and computer, and may take up to a minute per image.

indexReady.title: Your images are ready to search
indexReady.description: IMMARKUS has successfully analyzed your images and made them searchable. Pick the Visual Search smart tool in the Workspace to search for visually similar matches.
indexReady.deleteIndexDescription: Remove all indexed patches and embeddings. Visual search will be unavailable until the index is rebuilt.
indexReady.deleteIndexConfirm: This action will delete the visual search index permanently. Visual search will be unavailable until the index is rebuilt.

noIndex.intro1: With IMMARKUS Visual Search, you can find objects inside your images based on example. Pick the Visual Search smart tool in the Workspace, select an annotation, and find visually similar matches across your collection.
noIndex.intro2: Before you can use visual search, your images need to be indexed. IMMARKUS analyzes your images, detects objects, and makes them searchable. You only need to do this once.
noIndex.segmentationModelDescription: Controls how images are divided into searchable regions
noIndex.footnote: Indexing runs directly in your browser and does not upload your images to external services. Processing time depends on your collection and computer, and may take up to a minute per image.
